nodes.name: 紫珠鸠属
nodes.summary: 紫珠鸠属（Alopecoenas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Wetar ground dove、Shy ground dove、Santa Cruz ground dove等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: 特岛鸡鸠
nodes.summary: 特岛鸡鸠（Alopecoenas kubaryi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-fronted ground dove。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-fronted ground dove
nodes.summary: The white-fronted ground dove or Caroline Islands ground dove (Pampusana kubaryi) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to Micronesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical mangrove forest, subtropical or tropical moist montane forest, subtropical or tropical moist shrubland, and plantations . It is threatened by habitat loss. This species was formerly in the genus Alopecoenas Sharpe, 1899, but the name of the genus was changed in 2019 to Pampusana Bonaparte, 1855 as this name has priority. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
